## Safety and Privacy Checklist

- [ ] This change preserves explicit group allowlisting.
- [ ] This change does not add bulk messaging, scraping, evasion, or hosted consumer-account automation.
- [ ] WhatsApp text is not evaluated as shell code.
- [ ] Logs and diagnostics avoid credentials, QR payloads, pairing codes, and message bodies by default.
- [ ] Docs were updated for user-facing behavior or config changes.
